backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the fget backend, managing file/folder metadata, blob storage, access control, user approval, and admin operations. Defines core data types and exposes shared functions for file system operations, role management, and canister configuration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single feature (updating the app version string from 0.4.143 to 0.4.147 in appVersion.ts) to its affected file, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key functionality of components, hooks, and styles in the React frontend.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React frontend, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling Internet Identity authentication, access control bootstrapping, profile setup flow, pending-approval screen, folder navigation state, and conditional rendering of the main file management UI.
frontend/src/components/AccessDenied.tsx: Pending-approval screen shown to authenticated users without access, displaying a shortened copyable Principal ID and instructions to contact an administrator.
Empty file with no content; likely a placeholder for an admin management component.
frontend/src/components/FileGallery.tsx: Gallery-view component for displaying files and folders in a responsive grid with checkboxes for selection, hover-revealed action dropdowns (download, copy link, move, delete), image/video previews, and search-result path display.
frontend/src/components/FileList.tsx: Main file manager component that renders a browsable, searchable file/folder tree with support for upload, download, move, delete, preview, drag-and-drop, multi-select, sorting, and both list and gallery view modes.
frontend/src/components/FileListHeaderRo: Renders the table header row for the file list, including a select-all checkbox and sortable column buttons for Name, Type, Created, Size, and an optional Location column.
frontend/src/components/FilePreviewModal: Modal dialog that previews a selected file (image, video, audio, document, or text) with navigation between files, fullscreen/maximize support, and blob URL management.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a sticky footer displaying the copyright year, app version, and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar showing the app logo, authenticated user's name and principal ID (with copy), admin manage panel access, theme toggle, and login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/ManagePanel.tsx: Admin settings dialog for managing members (add/remove with role selection), viewing storage stats, and displaying app version info; auto-logs out the current user if they remove themselves.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding form that lets a newly authenticated user pick a unique username, with debounced uniqueness checking and backend validation error handling.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes, displaying Sun/Moon icons with CSS transitions.
frontend/src/components/ZoomPanViewer.ts: A wrapper component that enables mouse-drag panning and scroll-wheel zooming (0.5x–5x) for its children, resetting transform when children change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccessBootstrap.ts: A hook that calls `initializeAccessControl()` once per authenticated session (tracked via sessionStorage) and then invalidates/refetches access-related React Query caches.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating all dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity state, and login status, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient.
An in-memory hook that tracks a per-folder view mode ('list' or 'gallery'), defaulting to 'list', keyed by folder ID for the current session.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend data fetching and mutations (files, folders, user profiles, roles, access control), gating queries on actor availability and user access.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark theme CSS custom properties (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) and a custom breadcrumb-link utility class.
frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts: Exports a single constant `APP_VERSION` string set to '0.4.147'.
frontend/src/lib/canisterIds.ts: Utility that resolves ICP backend and frontend canister IDs by checking multiple sources in priority order: Vite env vars, window globals, URL params, hostname, and process.env.
frontend/src/lib/dragDropDirectory.ts: Provides utilities to extract files from drag-and-drop events, recursively traversing directories using the FileSystem API and falling back to standard file drops when unavailable.
frontend/src/lib/fileLinks.ts: Provides utilities to get direct download URLs, copy file links to the clipboard, and download files with correct filenames using blob URLs.
frontend/src/lib/fileTypes.ts: Provides helpers to extract file extensions, map extensions to MIME types, check file categories (image, video, audio, etc.), and generate human-readable file type labels.
frontend/src/lib/fileTypeTints.ts: Maps file categories, folders, and unknown types to Tailwind CSS tint class strings for light/dark themed badge styling.
frontend/src/lib/folderNavigation.ts: Provides utilities for folder navigation including building breadcrumb paths, resolving path segments to folder IDs, and computing full path strings for files and folders.
frontend/src/lib/folderUpload.ts: Handles recursive folder uploads by extracting folder file structures, creating all required folders in depth order, and uploading non-empty files with progress callbacks.
frontend/src/lib/formatFileSize.ts: Formats a file size in bytes (number or bigint) into a human-readable string using base-1024 units (B, KB, MB, etc.).
frontend/src/lib/formatTime.ts: Converts backend bigint nanosecond timestamps into formatted English date/time strings with full, date-only, and compact variants.
frontend/src/lib/id.ts: Exports a single function that generates a cryptographically secure 32-byte random ID as a hex string for use as file and folder upload IDs.
frontend/src/lib/searchNormalize.ts: Provides Unicode-aware, case-insensitive, diacritics-insensitive text normalization and substring matching utilities for search functionality.
frontend/src/lib/sortFileSystemItems.ts: Exports a `sortFileSystemItems` function that sorts an array of `FileSystemItem` objects by name, size, type, created, or updated fields with configurable direction and deterministic tie-breakers (kind, name, id).
frontend/src/lib/subtreeIndex.ts: Exports `buildSubtreeFolderIds` which builds a parent-to-children index from a flat folder list and returns a Set of all folder IDs in the subtree rooted at a given folder (or all root folders if null).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root `App` component wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the current version (0.4.143→0.4.147), architectural notes, existing features, and a pending toolbar button styling request (AR-2) for FileList.tsx.
